headline: How The PACCAR (PCAR) Investment Story Is Evolving With New Valuation Targets And Technology Risks
summary: PACCAR’s fair value estimate has been revised higher, shifting from US$122.15 to US$127.96, which catches the eye if you are tracking where analysts think the stock could reasonably trade. Recent research ties these mid single digit target moves to growing confidence that PACCAR’s revenue outlook can support current assumptions, while also highlighting debates around execution risks and technology shifts in trucks and commercial vehicles. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these...

headline: Earnings Preview: Paccar (PCAR) Q1 Earnings Expected to Decline
summary: Paccar (PCAR) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
